creator: g.veniamin@googlemail.com
text:
I use WPA2-PSK CCMP on my AP.

ugen2.2: <vendor 0x0bda> at usbus2
urtw0: <vendor 0x0bda product 0x8189, class 0/0, rev 2.00/2.00, addr 2> on usbus2
urtw0: rtl8187b rf rtl8225z2 hwrev e


# wpa_supplicant -iwlan0 -c/etc/wpa_supplicant.conf
